name: neuralforge
description: Build, train, optimize, and deploy neural networks from natural language. Agent-native neural engineering platform with PyTorch backend. Supports 8+ architecture families, auto-architecture search, hyperparameter optimization, pruning, quantization, distillation, and neural quality prediction.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif

schema.title: Create Neural Network
schema.description: Create a neural network model from a natural language description. Parses architecture family (CNN, ResNet, Transformer, ViT, etc.), task type, and constraints like parameter count, memory, and accuracy targets.

description.description: Natural language model description. Examples: 'Build a ResNet for CIFAR-10 with <5M params', 'Vision transformer for medical image classification under 8GB VRAM', 'Transformer for sentiment analysis with >90% accuracy'

architecture.description: Architecture family (cnn, resnet, transformer, vit, etc.)

schema.title: Train Neural Network
schema.description: Train a neural network with production-grade settings including mixed precision (AMP), exponential moving average (EMA), learning rate scheduling (cosine, one-cycle), gradient accumulation, and early stopping.

schema.title: Evaluate Model
schema.description: Comprehensive model evaluation with accuracy, loss, macro-F1, per-class precision/recall/F1, confusion matrix, Expected Calibration Error (ECE), failure analysis (top confused pairs, high-confidence failures), and actionable improvement recommendations.

schema.title: Evaluate Model + Neural Quality Predictor
schema.description: Enhanced evaluation that trains a neural quality predictor on synthetic training histories, then uses it to predict final model quality from actual training dynamics. Returns standard metrics PLUS a neural quality score (0-1), confidence level, and predictor correlation. This tool demonstrates NeuralForge's self-improvement capability — a neural net evaluating another neural net.

num_trials.description: Number of synthetic training histories to generate for predictor training

quality_prediction.description: Neural quality score (0-1), confidence, epochs observed

predictor_training.description: Predictor final loss and correlation on training data

recommendations.description: Enhanced recommendations including quality predictor insights

schema.title: Optimize Architecture
schema.description: Run hyperparameter and architecture optimization via evolutionary search. Finds the best architecture and training recipe for a given objective (accuracy, loss, latency, parameters, memory).

num_trials.description: Number of architecture configurations to try

schema.title: Export Model
schema.description: Export a trained model to deployment format. Supports PyTorch state_dict, TorchScript (traced), ONNX (with dynamic axes), and Safetensors.

schema.title: Profile Model
schema.description: Profile a neural network model. Returns total parameters, trainable parameters, model size (MB), GPU memory usage, mean/p95 latency (ms), and throughput (samples/sec).

schema.title: Prune Model
schema.description: Prune a neural network model to reduce size and improve inference speed. Supports L1 unstructured pruning (global) and structured pruning. Returns original parameters and achieved sparsity percentage.

amount.description: Sparsity amount (0.0 to 1.0). E.g., 0.3 = 30% of weights pruned

schema.title: Quantize Model
schema.description: Quantize a neural network model for efficient deployment. Supports dynamic INT8 quantization (reduces model size ~4x). GPTQ, AWQ, and bitsandbytes require additional packages.
